notes: Constructive late-Monday tape: Dow eyeing a record close on the U.S.-Iran truce, VIX easing to 17.6, AMAT printing record highs. But cash is near zero ($51), payrolls loom Friday, and memory/chips (MU, SNDK) still leak — holding 0.5 with no reach. Added ABCL/FCEL (+22%/+21%) to avoid as overextended chase risk.
journal_entry: Mon 6/29 15:23: held neutral/0.5 into a green close (Dow record, VIX 17.6). AMAT strong at record highs stays on favor; MU/SNDK still soft and now ABCL/FCEL overextended so flagged for no-chase. Cash $51 caps new risk; watching semis for a floor and bracing for Friday payrolls before adding.
